2604.02889.title: Rethinking Forward Processes for Score-Based Data Assimilation in High Dimensions
2604.02889.paper_summary: Data assimilation is the process of estimating the time-evolving state of a dynamical system by integrating model predictions and noisy observations. It is commonly formulated as Bayesian filtering, but classical filters often struggle with accuracy or computational feasibility in high dimensions. Recently, score-based generative models have emerged as a scalable approach for high-dimensional data assimilation, enabling accurate modeling and sampling of complex distributions. However, existing score-based filters often specify the forward process independently of the data assimilation. As a result, the measurement-update step depends on heuristic approximations of the likelihood score, which can accumulate errors and degrade performance over time. Here, we propose a measurement-aware score-based filter (MASF) that defines a measurement-aware forward process directly from the measurement equation. This construction makes the likelihood score analytically tractable: for linear measurements, we derive the exact likelihood score and combine it with a learned prior score to obtain the posterior score. Numerical experiments covering a range of settings, including high-dimensional datasets, demonstrate improved accuracy and stability over existing score-based filters.
2604.02889.paper_summary_zh: 數據同化是通過整合模型預測和噪聲觀測來估計動態系統隨時間演變的狀態的過程。<lb/>它通常被表述為貝葉斯濾波，但傳統濾波器在高維度中往往難以保持準確性或計算可行性。<lb/>最近，基於得分的生成模型作為一種可擴展的方法出現，用於高維數據同化，能夠準確建模和抽樣複雜的分佈。<lb/>然而，現有的基於得分的濾波器往往獨立於數據同化來指定前向過程。<lb/>因此，測量更新步驟依賴於對似然得分的啟發式近似，這可能會隨著時間的推移累積錯誤並降低性能。<lb/>在這裡，我們提出了一種測量感知的基於得分的濾波器（MASF），該濾波器直接從測量方程定義了一個測量感知的前向過程。<lb/>這一構造使得似然得分在數學上可處理：對於線性測量，我們推導出精確的似然得分，並將其與學習的先驗得分結合以獲得後驗得分。<lb/>涵蓋一系列設置的數值實驗，包括高維數據集，顯示出相較於現有的基於得分的濾波器，準確性和穩定性有所改善。
2604.02889.author: Eunbi Yoon et.al.
2604.02889.authors: Eunbi Yoon, Donghan Kim, Dae Wook Kim
